---
title: "test_compile_failure_report_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\empire_tests\test_compile_failure_report_empire.py"
loc: 8
complexity: 1
logic_score: 9.50
style_score: 6.53
intel_score: 1.40
overall_score: 4.21
---

## Intent
The `test_compile_failure_report_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on test_compile_report_categorization. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via test_compile_report_categorization. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 9.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 6.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 1.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 6 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [src.tools.compile_failure_report](file://src.tools.compile_failure_report)

### Exports
- `test_compile_report_categorization`
